title: donax bicolor
intro: Donax bicolor, also known as Donax or Yellow Horned Poppy, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Donax bicolor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
